What We Do

Expert Masonry
From Foundation Up

Every scale — from feature walls and garden projects to full residential builds.

🏠

New Home Bricklaying

Full residential builds with architecturally selected bricks. We work closely with builders and homeowners to achieve standout results.

🧱

Brick & Blocklaying

Precision bricklaying and blockwork for all applications — extensions, garages, structural walls and feature elements.

🪟

Feature Walls

Internal and external feature walls with herringbone, stacked and custom patterns that become the focal point of any home.

🚪

Gates & Entrance Pillars

Brick entrance pillars, boundary walls and gate posts that frame your property with character and lasting durability.

🌿

Garden & Landscape Masonry

Raised garden beds, retaining walls, pathways and decorative stonework to elevate your outdoor living spaces.

🔧

Repairs & Restoration

Repointing, crack repairs and heritage brick restoration to bring ageing structures back to their best.

Why Choose Us

Your Local Masonry
Leader Since 2005

We’re a locally-owned business deeply rooted in the Macedon Ranges community. Our reputation is built on quality workmanship and honest relationships with every client.

🏆
20+ Years of Expertise

Established in 2005, hundreds of projects across Gisborne and the wider Macedon Ranges — our track record speaks for itself.

📐
Craftsmanship & Precision

Every course of brick is laid with care. Clean lines, consistent joints and finishes that make homes stand out for decades.

🤝
Reliable & Communicative

We show up when we say we will, keep you informed throughout, and don’t leave until you’re 100% satisfied.

How It Works

Simple, Stress-Free
From Quote to Completion

01

Free Quote

Call or fill in the form. We’ll visit your site and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote.

02

Plan & Schedule

We discuss your vision, confirm materials and lock in a start date that suits your timeline.

03

We Build

Our team gets to work with precision and care, keeping you updated throughout.

04

Handover

Full site walkthrough to make sure you’re completely happy before we call the job done.
